steps.text: Welcome to my office!
steps.speaker: Guide

steps.text: I'm a Full-Stack Software Engineer with a passion for building interactive web experiences.
steps.speaker: Guide

steps.text: I studied Computer Science and have been coding for over 5 years.
steps.speaker: Guide

steps.text: Feel free to explore the town to learn more about my work!
Welcome to the Workshop!
steps.speaker: Guide

steps.text: This is where I build things. Let me show you some of my projects.
steps.speaker: Guide

steps.text: Project Alpha — A real-time collaborative editor built with React, Node.js, and WebSockets.
Project Beta — An AI-powered image classifier using Python, TensorFlow, and a custom REST API.
Project Gamma — This very portfolio! A pixel-art game built with Phaser 3 and TypeScript.
Ah, the Library! This is where I keep my knowledge.
steps.speaker: Guide

steps.text: Languages: TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Go, SQL
Frontend: React, Next.js, Vue, Tailwind CSS, Phaser
Backend: Node.js, Express, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Redis
Tools: Git, Docker, AWS, CI/CD, Linux
You found the Post Office!
steps.speaker: Guide
